backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the backend for The Arena app, including user profiles, content metadata, comments, likes, follow functionality, playback queues, and social posts (Thoughts), with access control and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (React Query post hooks, WhatsOnYourMindPage, routing/nav additions) to their source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose and notable implementation details across the Arena app.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the React app titled 'The Arena', mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with routes for Feed, Upload, ContentDetail, UserProfile, and the new /mind (WhatsOnYourMindPage), and conditionally renders the ProfileSetupModal for new users.
Comments section component that displays, adds, and deletes comments for a content item, resolving author display names via profile queries and gating delete actions to comment owners.
frontend/src/components/ConfirmationDial: Reusable alert dialog component for confirming destructive or non-destructive actions, supporting custom labels, a loading/pending state, and arena-themed styling.
frontend/src/components/ContentCard.tsx: Renders a card for a media content item with thumbnail, file type badge, and action buttons (like, add to queue, delete, comments). Handles navigation to content detail and uploader profile pages.
frontend/src/components/EditProfileDialo: A dialog component for editing a user's profile name, bio, and profile picture, with support for uploading, previewing, and removing the profile image.
A drag-and-drop file input component that supports file selection via click or drag, displays the selected file's name and size, and allows clearing the selection.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main application layout component providing a sticky header with navigation links, login/profile controls, and a playback queue panel toggle.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: A button component that handles Internet Identity login and logout, showing a loading spinner during authentication and clearing the query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/MediaPlayer.tsx: A media player component supporting audio and video playback with controls for play/pause, seek, volume, repeat, skip, and next-track functionality.
frontend/src/components/ProfileMenu.tsx: Dropdown menu component for the logged-in user showing avatar, display name, and options to edit profile, delete account, or log out. Handles profile picture blob URL creation/revocation and delegates mutations to React Query hooks.
frontend/src/components/QueuePanel.tsx: Slide-in side panel that displays the playback queue with controls to reorder, remove, or clear items, and navigate to a content item. Uses React Query hooks for queue state and shows file-type badges per item.
frontend/src/components/ThumbnailCreator: UI component for selecting a video thumbnail either by capturing a frame at a seekable position or by uploading an image file. Emits the chosen thumbnail as raw bytes via an onThumbnailCapture callback.
Displays a user's public profile card with avatar, bio, follower/following counts, and a follow/unfollow button for other users. Fetches profile data and picture via React Query hooks and handles own-profile detection.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, keyed by the current identity principal. Invalidates and refetches all dependent queries whenever the actor instance changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing Internet Computer authentication via AuthClient, exposing identity, login, clear, and status flags. Handles persistent identity loading on mount and delegation validity checks.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profile CRUD, profile picture management, content operations (likes, views, queue), comments, posts, and file uploads using the ICP actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Outfit and Bebas Neue fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines the Arena dark-theme design tokens (OKLCH color variables) plus utility classes for neon glow effects and card hover animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider for React Query and InternetIdentityProvider for ICP authentication wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/ContentDetailPage.tsx: Detail page for a single media item that renders a media player, metadata (views, likes, file type, date), queue controls, like/delete actions, and a collapsible comments section, with owner-only delete functionality.
frontend/src/pages/FeedPage.tsx: Main discovery feed page displaying all content with filtering by type (all/music/video), sorting (recent/popular), and text search, rendered as a responsive card grid with a hero banner and skeleton loading states.
frontend/src/pages/ProfileSetupModal.tsx: Modal dialog shown to new users for initial profile creation, allowing them to enter a display name, optional bio, and optional profile picture before saving via the saveCallerUserProfile mutation.
frontend/src/pages/UploadPage.tsx: Page component for uploading audio/video content with title, description, thumbnail, and album cover fields, tracking upload progress and calling the uploadContent mutation on submit.
frontend/src/pages/UserProfilePage.tsx: Page that parses a principal from the URL, validates it, and renders the UserProfileView component for the target user's profile.
frontend/src/pages/WhatsOnYourMindPage.t: Social post feed page with a composer (text + optional media, 500-char limit) and a reverse-chronological post feed showing author avatars, likes, timestamps, and owner-only delete actions.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/src/utils/videoFrameCapture.ts: Exports a single async function that captures the current frame of an HTMLVideoElement as a PNG Blob using an offscreen canvas.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom fonts, arena-themed color tokens, neon box-shadow utilities, and animation keyframes, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state manifest tracking schema version, existing implemented features, and pending new feature requests (AR-1 through AR-5) for the social platform.
